svg.text: Many firms instant-fail you for trading during news · know YOUR firm's rule before you click buy

g.text: Strict — No news trading allowed
FTMO, FundedNext, FundingPips, BrightFunded
Holding during news = potential instant termination
Rule: flatten 2 min before red-news, re-enter 2 min after
Moderate — Holding restricted
The5ers, BlueGuardian, AlphaFutures
Can open but not hold across high-impact news
Rule: NEVER hold over FOMC, CPI, NFP overnight
Lenient — News trading allowed
Apex, Bulenox, TPT, TradeDay (futures-focused)
No news restriction · gamble at your own risk
Rule: STILL size down 50% on event days
Special rules — Read fine print
Some firms: trade allowed if entered 30+ min before
Some: no restriction on micro-events, only majors
Rule: read terms before each eval
Major news to avoid (futures)
→ FOMC interest rate decision (8 per year, 2:00 PM ET Wednesdays)
→ CPI / Core CPI (monthly, 8:30 AM ET)
→ NFP / Unemployment (first Friday monthly, 8:30 AM ET)
→ EIA Petroleum Status (Wednesdays 10:30 AM ET, for CL only)
→ FOMC minutes (3 weeks after meeting, 2:00 PM ET)
